/usr/sbin/ar qc libramses_lib.a CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/Constants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/Parameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/AmrGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/Hilbert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/TreeUpdater.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/RamsesReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/HydroSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/RiemannSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/SlopeLimiter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/Muscl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ramses_lib.dir/src/Simulation.cpp.o
/usr/sbin/ranlib libramses_lib.a
